entries.spec_requirement: All 32 source PDFs inventoried with source_id, filename, batch, hash, status, group, artifacts, and boundaries
Visual inventory for all diagram-heavy PDFs with page_ref, visual_type, and content_role
Per-PDF semantic coverage and validation coverage reports for all 32 PDFs
Generic pattern map extracting reusable BenchCore patterns for Agent_X with abstraction level
Domain ontology with term files covering glossary, acronyms, ML terms, UI terms, command terms, protocol terms
Requirements extracted with source-to-artifact-to-test traceability for all now-status PDFs
Inverse-science alignment with reasoning-type rules, observations, hypotheses, candidate tests, and negative knowledge
Evaluation harness fixtures with valid/invalid datasets, expected metrics, config schema, and deployment gate
Feedback loop governance with policy documents for feedback, rollback, exploration, drift, diagnostics, and event schema
Dynamic retrieval fixtures with capability registry, query templates, reranking policy, and unsupported label cases
Learning policy with anti-retraining policy, allowed/forbidden mechanisms, and deferred training experiments
Grammar validation schemas for QuickCode, CG, OD, production cues with valid/invalid examples and AST/NLP contracts
Data quality policies for field quality, evidence fusion, XML cleanup, log parsing, SQL mapping, and I/O pairing
Protocol architecture mock contracts for MOS output, REST input, failure modes, adapter boundary, and REST-MOS mapping
Human review/UI schemas for suggestion card, feedback action, UI planning contract, and customer explanation
Operations boundaries deferred with boundary documents for WSL, MySQL restore, and remote log tailing
Optional benchmark separated for camera change detection outside BenchCore core scope
Universal readiness matrix scoring 20 dimensions with evidence references and sabotage test refs
Evidence reports including event log, validation report, sabotage report, clean replay, source diff review, and final acceptance
